title: Client: Reconnect with exponential backoff
description:
transport::connect() makes one attempt and returns an error on failure. The chat command gives up immediately. No reconnection loop.

Required:
- Reconnect loop in transport.rs with exponential backoff: 1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, ... cap at 60s
- Jitter: multiply delay by rand(0.8..1.2) to avoid thundering herd
- Max retries: configurable, default unlimited
- On reconnect: re-authenticate, drain server queue, flush local outbox
- Emit reconnecting... and reconnected. messages to the chat UI
- SIGINT cancels reconnect loop cleanly
